what_it_does: Collects blog requirements via form, generates an AI-powered outline, iteratively refines content through multiple AI passes, applies SEO optimization, and publishes finished articles directly to Contentful CMS.
pain_it_solves: Eliminates the manual process of drafting blog outlines, writing multiple content iterations, applying SEO optimization, and manually uploading articles to your CMS.
outcome: Professionally written, SEO-optimized blog posts automatically published to your website from a simple form submission.
opener_hook_draft: Writing blog posts means hours of drafting, editing, SEO work, and manual uploading.
bespoke_opener_full: Writing blog posts means hours of drafting, editing, SEO work, and manual uploading. This is how our AI Blog Post Generator produces professionally written, SEO-optimized articles and publishes them automatically to your CMS.
